description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these leather slippers from ganuchi are a perfect addition to your wardrobe.UpperSoft, wide leather strap over the midfoot to hold the foot in placeThread detailing on the strap for styleSoft and ergonomically padded and perforated leather footbed for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTextured PU outsole with multi-directional grooves for absolute grip shoe careUse a branded leather conditioner Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
